raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jehkaba Dsimmunu/ un man-
na Kalpa Dahvida/ ka es ne
neimnu no winna Dsimmunu
Walditajus pahr Ahbrdäma/
Ihsäika/ un Jehkaba Dsimmu-
mu. Jo es atgreesitchu winko
Zeetunu/ un apschehloschohs
pahr winneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Babeles/ un ar tawu pasd
Mutti tu winnu bildinaſt/
nahkſt uhs Babeli.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "4. Bet klaust ta KUNG
Wahrdü/ ak Zedekijus tu Ke-
nisch no Juhda! Ta faſka ta
KUNGS uhs teui: Tu ne n
mirſt zaur Sohbinu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "5. Tu nomirſt ar Meeru. U
pehz tahm Dedſinaſchanahin t
wo Tehvü/ to preeltchaſo Ke-
nizu/ kas tawā Preeltchaſā
bijufcht/ täpatt tee dedſinahs
wis labbad/ un noschehlohs ten
un fazzijhs: Ak Kungs! jo es
mu ſcho Wahrdü runnajs/ fo
ka tas KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XXXIV. Nodalla.
Weena bahrga Apdraudeschana/ ka Jerusalemei
buhs ar Ugguni jadedſinatai: 1/2. Un tam
Kehnizam Zedekijum faguhſſitam kkuht; 4.
Un tapehz ka tee Judi jawus fwabbadi lai,
flus Brahtus un Mahfas atkat eekſch jaunas
Kalpoſchanas bij speeduschi: 8/10. Buhs
teem wiſſai poſſta eet: 17.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "1. Chis irr tas Wahrdü/
Skas us Jeremiju notikke
no ta KUNGA/ kad
NebukadRezars tas Kehnisch
no Babeles/ un wiſſ winna Ka-
va-Spehks/ un wiſſas Semmes
Walstibas/ kas appafſch tahs
Waldoſchanas winna Rohkas
bija/ un wiſſi Landis prett Je-
rusalemē/ un wiſſeem winnas
Pilſſahiteem karroja/ un fazzija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "2. Ta faſka tas KUNGS/
tas Iſraeta Deeivs: Eis/ un
runna us Zedekiju to Kehnizu no
Juhda/ un faſki us to: Ta faſka
tas KUNGS: Reds/ es dohmu
ſcho Pilſſahtu tam Kehnizam no
Babeles Rohkā/ un winſch fa-
dedſinahs te ar Ugguni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "3. Un tu ne iſbehgſi no win-
na Rohkas/ bet tapſt teefcham
grabbts/ un winnam Rohkā
dohſs/ un tawas Azzis redſehs
tahs Azzis ta Kehnizu no
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "6. Un tas Praiveets Jerem
ius fazzija wiſſus ſchohs Wal-
dus us Zedekiju to Kehnizu
Juhda/ Jerusalemē.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "7. Kad tas Karra-Spehts
Kehniza no Babeles kar-
prett Jerusalemi/ un prett n
feem zitteem Pilſſahiteim
Juhda/ prett Lakifü/ un pi
Asekü/ jo ſchee ſtipri Pilſſa-
bija atlikkutchi starp teem Pi-
tahteem Juhda.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "8. Schis irr tas Wahrd
kas notikke us Jeremiju no
KUNGA/ pehz ka tas Kehni-
Zedekijus weenu Derribu bij-
rijs ar wiſſeem Landim/ kas
rusalemē bija/ weenu Swab-
dibas-Gaddu winneem ista-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "9. Ka ikfatram fawn Ka-
un ikfatram fawn Kalponi/
weens Eebreeris jeb Eebreer-
irr/ bij fwabbadu atlaiſt/ ka-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
